CN108350607A - Can high-temperature dyeing Fypro 
        - Google Patents
results.content: 表示纤维的强度的参数，通常是纤维的拉伸试验中的纤维破断时的强力，表示织物的强度的参数通常是破裂强度、撕裂强度。但是纤维的强度和织物的强度之间并没有很强的关联关系。这是由于，与纤维的拉伸试验不同，在布帛产品中大量纤维被复杂地配置，相靠近的纤维彼此干扰的缘故。本发明人对纤维物性和布帛产品的物性之间的相关关系进行了研究，结果发现，布帛产品的物性根据布帛设计而大大不同，例如在同一设计的布帛中，纤维的拉伸试验中伸长15％时的单位纤度的应力与布帛产品的物性相关。即、通过使纤维的拉伸试验中伸长15％时的单位纤度的应力在该范围，能够得到撕裂强力等的物性优异的布帛。更优选为3.0cN/dtex以上。The parameter showing the strength of the fiber is usually the strength at which the fiber breaks in a tensile test of the fiber, and the parameter showing the strength of the fabric is usually the bursting strength and the tearing strength. But there is not a strong correlation between fiber strength and fabric strength. This is because, unlike the tensile test of fibers, a large number of fibers are arranged in a complicated manner in a fabric product, and adjacent fibers interfere with each other. [...] 100°C. Although the structure of the amorphous part forms hydrogen bonds, it forms a deformed structure unlike the crystal part. The difficulty of breaking the hydrogen bond in the amorphous part is determined by the magnitude of the strain in the structure of the amorphous part. That is, the less the strain in the structure of the amorphous part is, the less likely it is to break the hydrogen bonds in the amorphous part. The structural strain of the amorphous portion is determined by the hydrogen bond formation energy between amide bonds of the polyamide, that is, the degree of freedom of the main chain of the polyamide molecule. The degree of freedom of the polyamide molecular main chain referred to here is determined by the distance of amide bonds in one molecule of polyamide, that is, [...] 因此，通过选择该范围的聚酰胺，即使在高于100℃的高温染色中，非晶部的酰胺键间的氢键也不容易被切断，纤维结构变化小，能够得到染色时的布帛的防褶皱性优异的聚酰胺纤维。Therefore, by selecting a polyamide in this range, even in high temperature dyeing at a temperature higher than 100° C., the hydrogen bond between the amide bonds in the amorphous part is not easily broken, the fiber structure changes little, and the fabric is resistant to dyeing. Polyamide fiber with excellent wrinkle properties.

results.title: The Most Frustrating Failure This Year | Forspoken
results.content: wrong but several things went wrong to give us the end goal that we eventually got and before you even get into the gameplay elements are first spoken that 10-year development when you is already frustrating enough because over a 10-year span you expect the end goal from that 10 years to be something exceptional something unique something that is going to have people talking in a positive light for years to come not the meme compilations that we ended up getting but unfortunately trouble development isn't anything new to luminous Studios even with their first title Final Fantasy XV it went through a development hell of sorts before we got to the end goal that we ended up getting luckily for Final Fantasy XV fans everywhere such as myself Square Enix was gracious enough to allow luminous [...] frustrating that I'm never going to get a game with this combat system again let alone a good game with this combat system and while we're lucky enough to live in the Modern Age where games can be fixed in post that only works if the basic skeleton framework of that game is able to be repaired and unfortunately for spoken's base framework is so broken and fragile that you can only expand on the good things but you're never going to be able to make the bad things any better the only hope for forespoken is that DLC that's coming out but given the state that the final game came in I am not holding my breath on its quality but we will see and if you're interested in seeing what that has in store don't forget to like And subscribe we'll be playing that forespoken DLC as soon as it comes out [...] liked about the game but also expanded on everything else that people did not like about the game and I've never seen a game that has such a clear-cut show of where the budget got dropped to get this game pushed out NPCs look horrible the environments that you take place in that aren't open World areas look terrible the dialogue is unmeshed together it feels very clunky and disconnected there's not a lot of emotion behind any characters outside of the main cast everything just feels out of place and unfun which again extremely disappointing because I did have fun with this game I did enjoy the parkour systems in the combat and the final version of the game only expanded on my enjoyment of those systems which makes it infinitely more frustrating that I'm never going to get a game with this
